title: Web-to-Cloud: Network Firewall C2 and Threat Alerts
description: Correlates Network Firewall traffic and threat records for the C2 destination. Threat Name, Firewall Rule, byte counts, and action values show whether the exfiltration was alerted, allowed, or denied.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' and ('Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' != null) | stats count as Events, unique('Threat Name') as Threats, unique('Firewall Rule') as Rules, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent by 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Action', 'Log Type' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Which Network Firewall rule observed the C2/exfiltration traffic?
Did the firewall allow, alert, or deny the suspicious session?
